description_long: This is a large, heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a robust, boxy structure. The exterior is covered in dark, matte plating with visible hatches, access panels, and reinforced edges, suggesting strong ballistic protection. The vehicle features multiple mounted weapon systems, including machine gun mounts on the roof and front, as well as antennae and periscopes for communication and observation. The rear of the vehicle has a large ramp-style door for troop or cargo access, flanked by red lights and additional equipment storage. The sides are equipped with modular armor panels and storage compartments, while the roof is fitted with various hatches and equipment mounts. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing protection, firepower, and troop transport capabilities in urban environments.
description: A large, dark, heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with multiple weapon mounts, roof hatches, and a rear ramp door for access. Its angular, reinforced exterior is designed for protection and urban operations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular armored plating, roof-mounted weapon, and forward observation equipment.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the lowered ramp door, red lights, and rear-mounted equipment.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the modular armor panels, side hatches, and weapon mounts.
description_view_3: Rear angled view with the ramp door open, showing roof hatches and rear equipment details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible weapon mounts: one on the front right roof (machine gun mount) and one on the rear left roof (machine gun mount).
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced panels on the sides, front, and roof; modular and sloped design for ballistic protection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark gray/black color; no visible camouflage pattern.
